picks.reason: Messy input becomes a portable brief, with a natural low-friction CTA.
A visible stuck point leads directly to a focused, answer-producing test.
The first message yields a test, expected signal, and action for either result.
Free problem-sharpening proves fit before asking for monthly commitment.
It makes monthly value testable, lowering risk with a concrete first conversation.
A doubtful estimate becomes an updatable range with an explicit revision trigger.
Fixed-deadline urgency meets a calm, concrete scope promise and aligned CTA.
The AI idea gains a real usage moment—or an honest reason to stop.
Pasting the caveat produces a plain client choice instead of vague reassurance.
Recurring symptoms create urgency; examples lead to evidence that separates competing explanations.
Normalized friction becomes visible cost, a replaced rule, and a responsible repair.
A stalled team choice gains ownership, criteria, and a credible route to closure.
It removes sales pressure while making the right-sized answer the immediate product.
A fixed date creates urgency; fallback, switch signal, and owner make action concrete.
The almost-deleted sentence is natural chat input with a specific diagnostic payoff.
